response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience but lacks the core requirement of 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015, and there is no demonstrated Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience. SQL Server/Oracle experience is also not evident — listed SQL skills lean toward MongoDB/MySQL.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Demonstrated communication skills via workshops, talks, and teaching
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
concerns: No substantial C++ Windows development experience (only ~6 months in 2014–2015)
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and communication skills
